candidate_blockers.detail: At least one required formulation remains unsupported in the core traction policy and is recorded as not_run rather than sampled.
dual_one_sided_offset0p51_pressure_only remains not_run because the core does not yet expose per-face one-sided pressure regions.
Two-sided dual-face pressure-only rows remain strongly sensitive to marker face offset, so this sampling matrix cannot select a reference formulation.
Rows reuse one archived flow snapshot and do not advance the coupled solver; they are evidence for traction sampling behavior only.
No reference formulation should be selected from a sampling-only matrix.

rows.scope_limit: shared snapshot sampling-only traction formulation comparison on archived shared preflow velocity/pressure/obstacle fields; does not advance coupled FSI and does not claim Fluent parity.
rows.status_reason: completed; pressure means exposed_by_core_stress_face_diagnostics; mean field is pressure_jump_pa

rows.status_reason: dual-face one-sided pressure needs per-face one-sided region support; current core exposes one one_sided_pressure_region_id
